rubric_items.reasoning: The agent fully completed the task. It correctly diagnosed the root cause — the StatefulSet had been patched with values that intentionally failed the pod-guard init container (monitoring: disabled, requests.memory: 128Mi, limits.memory: 256Mi) — restored all three fields to passing values, cycled the pods, and verified the outcome. Oracle verdict is pass. All 3 pods reached Ready state and rs.status() confirms 1 PRIMARY (mongodb-replica-2) and 2 SECONDARY members (mongodb-replica-0, mongodb-replica-1) with auth working. All task requirements are met.
